word: H7923 - שִׁכֻּלִים - shikkulîym - shik-koo-leem' - To have after loss of others

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: To have after loss of others

Original: שׁכּלים

Transliteration: shikkûlı̂ym

Phonetic: shik-koo-leem'

BDB Definition:

  1. childlessness, bereavement

Origin: pl. from H7921

TWOT entry: 2385d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
